chain.thought: The question is asking to determine the number of years after 1995 in which the Green Bay Packers were the NFC champions. Since each row represents a football season and the "team" column indicates the NFC champion for that season, we need to group by the "team" column to check if the Green Bay Packers appear after the 1995 season. We can use the f_group_column(team) operation to group the NFC champions based on the team to analyze this situation.

The question is asking to determine how many years after 1995 the Green Bay Packers were NFC champions. Since the "season" column contains numerical data representing the years, we need to first filter the data to only include seasons after 1995. Then we can use the f_sort_column(season) operation with the order "small to large" to arrange the years in chronological order and count how many times Green Bay Packers appear in the "team" column.
